title: SCASL Protocol Version 1.0.0
author: Xianke Xiang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: SCASL is a strategy of cell clustering by systematically assessing the landscapes of single-cell RNA splicing. This is the initial version of SCASL, we will continue to supplement the functions and application range of SCASL.
